'''Lumus''' was a former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] condemned to [[Death/Legends|death]] for his part in a brutal massacre. However, his sentence was commuted by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] along with those of [[Nevo]], [[Fraal]], and [[Gann (assassin)|Gann]] so that they could follow [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] along his hunt of [[Abal Karda]]. Lumus was killed by Fett on [[Maryx Minor/Legends|Maryx Minor]].

==Appearances==
*[[Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire 1|''Boba Fett: Enemy of the Empire'' 1]] {{1st}}
